summary: Base W6 — ~17 mpw (up from ~14, ~10% bump per §11.D), polarized ~85% Z1. Two anchors: Tue is the formal T-pace re-test under restored standard ordering (run AM, lift PM ≥6h gap) at 5×5 min @ T (Adj #16) — confirm 7:55–8:10/mi sits at RPE ≤7 or slow to 8:05–8:10; Incline BB steps 135→140 if clean. Sat is the big bump day: lat 145 (restore full 4 sets, Adj #17), chest-supp row 85 (Adj #18), cable lat 20/side (Adj #19), seated calf 335 (Adj #22), plus two holds-until-clean (preacher 55 Adj #21, tri pushdown 52.5 Adj #20) and soleus restore + push duration (owed twice — Adj #14/#23). SI confirmed clean throughout (≥3 consecutive clean weeks), so the hill-stride SI gate is now satisfied — hill strides eligible W7 Mon; held in W6 only to avoid stacking a new NM stimulus on the first mileage-bump week (§11.D) and to re-establish flat-stride cadence (Adj #24). Flat strides W6 per §2.A, cap cadence ≤180. Run-MHR retest still priority (Adj #9).

days.note: Hill strides now SI-gate-eligible (clean ≥3 wks) but held one more week — §11.D first mileage-bump week + reset flat-stride cadence first; online W7 Mon. Flat strides only. Cadence ≤180, let pace settle ~6:00/mi feel (fix Adj #24). No lift.

days.session: T 5×5 min @ T (1 min rec) AM + Hyp A PM (≥6h gap)
days.note: Formal T-pace re-test under restored standard ordering (Adj #16) — target 7:55–8:10/mi, RPE ≤7; slow to 8:05–8:10 if hot. Incline BB 135→140 if clean (§5). DB lat raise push/bump (was soft RIR 3-4). Fold in run-MHR retest (Adj #9).
Recovery aerobic; nasal gate is the reference (Adj #9), ignore off-191 ≤155 cap.

days.note: Pure aerobic or recovery — autoregulate off Tue quality + Wed.
Quality day #2 — last 10 min at M pace (8:30/mi). Base block, no VO2max yet (§4.C).

days.session: Long Z1 55 min AM + Hyp B PM (≥6h gap)
days.note: Big bump day. Bumps: lat 145 + restore 4 sets (Adj #17), chest-supp row 85 (Adj #18), cable lat 20/side (Adj #19), seated calf 335 (Adj #22). Holds-until-clean: preacher 55 (Adj #21), tri pushdown 52.5 (Adj #20). Soleus restore + push duration/knee (Adj #14/#23 owed). Hanging SLR → 12 reps.
Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1. Walking fine.
